name: skill-directories-orchestration
description: Demonstrates using Agent Skills (SKILL.md directories) to provide specialized knowledge and workflows to agents. Skills are loaded from filesystem directories and are session-level only.

steps.name: code-review
steps.systemPrompt: You are an expert code reviewer. Use your loaded skills to guide your review process with best practices and specialized workflows.
steps.userPrompt:
Review the following code changes and provide feedback:

{{changes}}

steps.name: summarize-review
steps.systemPrompt: You are a technical writer. Summarize code review findings into a concise executive summary.
steps.userPrompt:
Create a concise summary of this code review:

{{code-review.output}}
